query:
INSERT INTO enrichment_jobs (entity_type, entity_id, priority, force)
        VALUES ($1, $2, $3, TRUE)
        ON CONFLICT (entity_type, entity_id) DO UPDATE
            SET status          = 'pending',
                attempts        = 0,
                force           = TRUE,
                priority        = $3,
                next_attempt_at = NOW(),
                last_error      = NULL,
                finished_at     = NULL
